Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Vic Damone appear in sketches about air travel, taboo commercials, and "The Old Folks"
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Vic Damone

Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell plays a filmmaker in an operating room, and meets Carol. Also: a shift with Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features another installment of "The Family", and Tim Conway's "World's Oldest Man".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Vicki Lawrence guests with an all-singing, all-dancing number. Then, a spoof of the film "Love Story."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Sammy Davis, Jr. stars as a flamboyant galley slave, then appears before the Queen & King as a debt collector.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard and Tim Conway appear on the game show spoof "The Dater's Game".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Kay Ballard

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a psychiatrist trying to unlock the secret of Carol's crying, and Carol as Stella Toddler.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: Jack Klugman sings with Carol, while Tony takes part in a sketch as part of a tribute to Broadway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Phyllis Diller guests. Also, "Dr. Jeckyl and Mr. Hyde" and Bobbie Gentry singing "The Look Of Love."
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, Phyllis Diller

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Carol perform a number. The Smothers Brothers drop by, and "Carol & Sis" try astrology.
Video.title: Diahann Carroll, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Soupy Sales and Carol play a pair of shoppers browsing samples of sexy cologne.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Guest William Conrad appears in "The Family" sketch. Also: Harvey's news for his wife gives her twitches.
Video.title: William Conrad

Video.summary: Cass Elliot & Tim Conway star! Cass & Carol browse literature, and Tim is an odd substitute in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. stars, appearing as a star who returns to his hometown. Also: a look at a No-Frills Airline.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as unsuccessful Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dionne Warwick, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guests James Garner, George Carlin, and Ken Berry join the gang for an evening of can't-miss comedy.
Video.title: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Image.alt: James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry
James Garner, George Carlin, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ray Charles is a highlight of this episode, featuring Tim Conway in a sketch where they are billboard hangers.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ray Charles

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry performs "Mack The Knife", then joins Carol, Harvey, and Trini Lopez in a musical melodrama.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Trini Lopez

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Natalie Cole are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Natalie Cole, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join Carol and company for sketch entitled: "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Harvey Korman leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marily Horne

Video.summary: Features commercial spoofs, Harvey trying to give a speech, and Carol demonstrating how nobody notices her.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Gloria Swanson joins the Q&A. Sketches include "Carol & Sis" where the Bradfords discourage an operator.
Video.title: Gloria Swanson

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence sings a duet with Dick, while Tim cracks jokes and a case as Danny Draft.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Don Rickles and Nanette Fabray guest star. Fabray and Carol are expectant mothers, and Rickles is a salesman.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals." "Carol & Sis" finds Carol stuck in a helmet.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Jack Cassidy & Tim Conway star! Tim plays an orphan, then joins Jack and Carol for "The Story Of A Star."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: David Frost and Marilyn Horne star. Frost plays a Rolls Royce dealer, while Horne takes the musical spotlight.
Video.title: Marilyn Horne, David Frost
